CustomField.description: Identifies the parent Supplemental Rent Rate record when this rate belongs to a Sub-fund. Used to maintain hierarchy between Parent and Sub-fund SRRs for rate schedules, escalations, and utilization calculations.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select the Parent Rate this Sub-fund rate rolls up into. Sub-fund rates are linked to a Parent SRR to ensure correct totals during schedules, utilization, and invoicing.
CustomField.label: Parent SRR
